pageContext.name: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2)
pageContext.description: A2 (YoRHa Type A No. 2) from the Action RPG NieR:Automata has become a figure with the prototype sculpted by Mitsumasa Yoshizawa (REFLECT).   The Type-4O Sword and dedicated stand are included in addition to the main A2 figure which comes with a long hair head type and body with a heat-radiating camisole.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your NieR:Automata collection today!
